prompt_2_output.description: Required (non-nullable) parameters must contain a value.
Required parameters must not be 'Not Found', 'N/A', 'Unknown', etc.
Atomic parameters must be a single value with no ';' delimiter.
Composite parameters must contain at least 'minimum_element' values.
prompt_2_output.example_scenarios: key_competitors (min 5) Fail: 'A; B'; Pass: 'A; B; C; D; E'

prompt_2_output.description: Composite parameters must contain at most 'maximum_element' values.
No empty values between delimiters.
Composite values must not end with a stray ';'.
Each composite element must be concise (<= 300 chars).
Value length must be within [min_length, max_length] from data_type.
Cells must be single-line so they paste cleanly into Excel/CSV.
No '- ', '* ', bullet, or '1. ' markers inside a cell.
Values must be trimmed.
No accidental double spacing.
A value cannot be only punctuation/symbols.
URL parameters must start with http(s):// and contain no spaces.
Email parameters must look like name@domain.tld.
Phone parameters must contain at least 7 digits.
Rating parameters must be a number between 0 and 10.
Numeric parameters must contain at least one digit.
Value must match the parameter's regex_pattern (image URL, legal-name charset, handle).
prompt_2_output.example_scenarios: logo Fail: '.../logo' (no image ext); name Fail: 'Acme🚀'; handle Pass: '@acme'

prompt_2_output.description: Across the whole record, every non-nullable parameter has a value.
prompt_2_output.example_scenarios: Fail if ceo_name or website_url is blank

prompt_2_output.description: The record carries a key for all 163 parameters.
prompt_2_output.example_scenarios: Fail if any of the 163 column keys is missing

prompt_2_output.description: The record contains no keys outside the 163 parameters (plus company_id).
prompt_2_output.example_scenarios: Fail if a stray 'notes' column appears
